title: PET FOOD - 211info
text: UMPQUA VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY RESOURCE CENTER PET FOOD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dog and cat food. PO Box 651 Winchester, OR 97495 Eligibility: -Low-income pet owners -Animals must be spayed or neutered. If not, arrangements can be made to have the animal's surgery performed. Hours: 24 hours a day / 7 days a week Email (541) 972-5039 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 972-5039 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call for information -Leave a message if no answer with name, phone number, and pet need. Speak slowly and clearly. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Pet Food Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET ADOPTION ASSISTANCE DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - SPAY/NEUTER/EMERGENCY MEDICAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMPQUA VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY RESOURCE CENTER
